title: Project Manager(Non Tech) - FS - till end of 2026 - up to S$11k
description:
We’re looking for a skilled  Project Manager (Banking) for a contract until 31st December 2026, with potential to extend or go permanent.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Lead end-to-end project lifecycles from initiation to delivery
  • Develop detailed project plans, including scope, timelines, and resource allocation
  • Manage stakeholder communication across all organizational levels
  • Facilitate requirements gathering and validate deliverables against business needs
  • Collaborate with QA teams for testing and quality assurance
  • Run governance routines, senior working groups, and prepare dashboards and reports
  • Identify, assess, and mitigate project risks and issues
  • Coordinate cross-functional dependencies and manage project financials
  • Leverage AI-driven analytics and automation to enhance reporting and forecasting
  • Identify opportunities for process improvement and AI integration
  • Support change management activities for smooth adoption
  • Ensure compliance with governance frameworks and organizational standards


Required Skills:

  • 8+ years of project management experience, with a focus on operations and delivering complex projects
  • Proven track record of managing multiple projects concurrently, on time and within budget
  • Strong stakeholder management and influencing skills
  • Solid knowledge of operational lifecycle and project methodologies (Agile, PRINCE2, PMP)
  • Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Project, Visio) and tools like MS Project, JIRA
  • Exposure to AI tools (e.g., Copilot) for automation and reporting is a plus
  • Experience in Financial Services, Investment Banking, or Global Markets Operations is preferred
  • Knowledge of structured business analysis (e.g., Six Sigma) and SharePoint workflows is advantageous

Desired Competencies:

  • Strategic Thinking and Business Results orientation
  • Leadership and People Management skills
  • Personal Effectiveness and Resilience under pressure
  • Strong Planning, Organization, and Communication skills

Interested candidates may apply through the application system or send it to sg-rscontracting@morganmckinley.com. Shortlisted candidates will be notified.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to Morgan Mckinley Pte Ltd and its affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy available at https://www.morganmckinley.com/sg/privacy-policy. You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

Morgan McKinley Pte Ltd
Koh Boon Sien

EA Registration No. R1110345

postedCompany.description:
As a global professional services recruitment consultancy, Morgan McKinley connects specialist talent with leading employers across multiple industries and disciplines.


Our promise to you

You can get the best advice for your career at Morgan McKinley. Our team of consultants have either have an educational background in their sector or have industry experience. We take the time to listen to your long term goals and provide you with honest feedback to help you realise them.

Over the years many people have progressed their careers with us both here in Singapore and internationally and our global presence gives us insight into the domestic and international  markets. In Singapore we specialise in Banking & Financial Services, Legal, Compliance & Audit, Finance & Accounting, IT, Project Management, Sales & Marketing, HR and Supply Chain & Procurement.
postedCompany.name: MORGAN MCKINLEY PTE. LTD.
